_comment: GENERATED by `npm run icons:build`. Agent-facing index of available <IconAsset name=...> assets (the asset library is otherwise invisible to a planner). category/desc come from each public/icons/<name>.meta.json. Do NOT hand-edit.

assets.name: abacus
assets.desc: three-row counting abacus with colored beads

assets.name: add-blocks
assets.desc: colored number blocks with a plus sign

assets.name: ancient-glyph-ear
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 耳 (ear) — an outer ear curve enclosing an inner whorl

assets.name: ancient-glyph-eye
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 目 (eye) — an almond eye outline with a center pupil dot

assets.name: ancient-glyph-field
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 田 (field) — a square plot divided into four by a cross

assets.name: ancient-glyph-fire
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 火 (fire) — a central flame tongue flanked by two side licks

assets.name: ancient-glyph-foot
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 足 (foot) — a rounded foot loop above a leg and footprint base

assets.name: ancient-glyph-grain
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 禾 (grain) — a grain stalk with a drooping seed-head, leaves, and roots

assets.name: ancient-glyph-hand
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 手 (hand) — a wrist stem with splayed radiating fingers

assets.name: ancient-glyph-moon
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 月 (moon) — a crescent with two short interior strokes

assets.name: ancient-glyph-mountain
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 山 (mountain) — three peaks rising from a baseline

assets.name: ancient-glyph-mouth
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 口 (mouth) — an open-mouth oval with a flat upper opening

assets.name: ancient-glyph-stone
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 石 (stone) — a cliff overhang stroke above a rounded boulder

assets.name: ancient-glyph-sun
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 日 (sun) — a rounded disc outline with a center dot

assets.name: ancient-glyph-water
assets.desc: oracle-bone-style ancient pictograph for 水 (water) — a central flowing stroke flanked by two ripple strokes
